max_sentences: 3
topic: how the DELEGATE_BACKEND auto mode chooses between MLX and Ollama
facts:
- DELEGATE_BACKEND defaults to auto since 2026-05-13
- auto probes MLX_HOST /v1/models with a 1-second timeout, overridable via DELEGATE_BACKEND_AUTO_PROBE_TIMEOUT
- a 200 response resolves to mlx, anything else falls through to ollama
- explicit DELEGATE_BACKEND=ollama or =mlx skips the probe entirely
